description: Blue Sky Plan is open with a mandibular CBCT loaded. You need to configure a custom surgical guide sleeve for a clinical case using a 'Steco' universal sleeve kit. Place an implant at site #30 (lower right first molar) and configure the custom guide tube settings with an offset of 9.5 mm, a hole diameter of 5.3 mm, and a height of 4.0 mm. Generate a drilling report and save it as a PDF to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\BlueSkyPlan\Sleeve_Report.pdf.
